title: 10 best herbal tinctures for ringworm
description: Sweet violet tinctures helps with ringworm because of its antifungal properties, which effectively combat the fungal infection that causes this common skin condition. The herb's active compounds, such as acetoside and gallic acid, have been shown to inhibit the growth of fungi, including Candida and Malassezia species, which are commonly associated with ringworm. Additionally, sweet violet tinctures may help soothe irritated skin and reduce inflammation, promoting a healthy environment...
